notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.
